title: Zhenan Bao - Bao Group - Stanford University
text:
Section Title: Zhenan Bao
Content:
Bao co-founded  C3 Nano and PyrAmes, both are silicon-valley venture funded start-ups. She serves as an advising Partner for Fusion Venture Capital.
**INTERVIEWS**

Section Title: Zhenan Bao
Content:
**Zhenan Bao** is K.K. Lee Professor of Chemical Engineering, and by courtesy, Professor of Chemistry, Professor of Materials Science and Engineering, and Professor of Bioengineering at Stanford University. Bao founded the Stanford Wearable Electronics Initiate (eWEAR) in 2016 and serves as the faculty director.
Prior to joining Stanford in 2004, she was a Distinguished Member of Technical Staff in Bell Labs, Lucent Technologies from 1995-2004. She received her Ph.D in Chemistry from the University of Chicago in 1995.  She has over 770 refereed publications and over 80 US patents with a Google Scholar H-Index of 239.
Bao is a member of the National Academy of Sciences, National Academy of Engineering, the American Academy of Arts and Sciences and the National Academy of Inventors. She is a foreign member of the Chinese Academy of Sciences. She is a Fellow of AIMBE, MRS, ACS, AAAS, SPIE, ACS PMSE and ACS POLY.

BIOGRAPHY
Zhenan Bao is K.K. Lee Professor of Chemical Engineering, and by courtesy, a Professor of Chemistry and a Professor of Material Science and Engineering at Stanford University. Bao founded the Stanford Wearable Electronics Initiate (eWEAR) in 2016 and serves as the faculty director.
